summary: Iteration 27: Student Strengths & Weaknesses Feature - ALL FEATURES WORKING. Tested: Backend (Student model has strengths/weaknesses fields, POST/PUT/GET APIs work correctly), Frontend (StudentFormDialog has new textareas with blue styling and helper text, Landing page has new 'superpowers and help them grow' section).
critical_code_review_comments: Student model correctly includes 'strengths' and 'weaknesses' as string fields with empty string defaults
StudentCreate and StudentUpdate Pydantic models include the new fields
story_service.py includes strengths_section in AI prompt at lines 173-183
server.py passes strengths/weaknesses to generate_story at line 1206-1207
StudentFormDialog.jsx has data-testid=student-strengths and data-testid=student-weaknesses for testing
Landing page section has 4 checklist items and example AI story snippet
seed_data_creation: None required - used existing guardian account
context_for_next_testing_agent: Strengths/weaknesses feature fully functional. Student form has blue-bordered section with 'YOUR CHILD'S STRENGTHS & GROWTH AREAS' title. Strengths field has 'superpowers' helper text, Weaknesses field has 'empathy and encouragement' helper text. Landing page has 'Truly Personalized' section showing how AI uses strengths/weaknesses with example story snippet.
